results.name: tyr symbol
results.description: Scales and hammer.

results.name: ulalek
results.description: A fusion of Ulamog and Kozilek.

results.name: ulf
results.description: A student of Tolaria.

results.name: ulgrotha
results.description: The setting of the set "Homelands"

results.name: ulgrotha (origin)
results.description: A plane that was the setting of the Homelands expansion.

results.name: ultima weapon
results.description: Ultima Weapon, as in the recurring weapon from the franchise. For the mechanical weapon in FFXIV, see "Ultima Weapon (xiv)"

results.name: umbra
results.description: A creature aura. Not all umbras are umbra armor cards, and not all umbra armor cards depict umbras.

results.name: un-color
results.description: Colors that don't exist in black border, like gold or pink.

results.name: undaunted
results.description: Undaunted spells cost 1 less for each opponent you have.

results.name: undercut
results.description: A hairstyle involving one or both sides shaven.

results.name: undergrowth
results.description: Cards that care about the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

results.name: undergrowth-all
results.description: Cards that care about the amount of creatures card in all graveyards.

results.name: underworld
results.description: The Underworld of Theros.

results.name: un-design
results.description: Features characteristic of and unique to the world of un-sets.

results.name: undine
results.description: Merfolk from Eldraine.

results.name: unfinished artwork
results.description: Artwork that is in some stage of development that is not intended to be the final version.

results.name: un-forecast
results.description: Un-set cards that would later pave the way for black bordered mechanics

results.name: unheroic
results.description: Whenever you target something that's not yours, something good happens

results.name: uni
results.description: A unicorn from the Dungeons and Dragons cartoon.

results.name: unicorn
results.description: Like a narwhal but a horse.

results.name: uninspired
results.description: Effects that trigger when something becomes tapped. For cards that care about tapped permanents, see [synergy-tapped](synergy-tapped) and [tapped matters-self](tapped-matters-self).

results.name: unique counter
results.description: These cards use a type of counter no other card does.

results.name: unique creature type
results.description: Creatures with one or more single creature types that are unique to them

results.name: unique cr reference
results.description: There is an entire rule in the CR just to cover this card and no other card.

results.name: unique keyword
results.description: This card uses a keyword action, ability, or variant thereof that's found on no other cards.

results.name: unique mana cost
results.description: This card's mana cost isn't found on any other card.

results.name: unique mana symbol
results.description: Cards with mana symbols that only appear on them.

results.name: unique p/t
results.description: Cards with a power/toughness not seen on any other card.

results.name: unique token
results.description: This token is created by only one card.
